resume_action.description:
实验运行中（4 个任务），预计剩余 ~360min，每 10min 轮询一次
  train_lewm_vicreg -> GPU[3] (elapsed 166min, ~194min left); train_dino_wm -> GPU[5] (elapsed 166min, ~194min left); train_oracle_baseline -> GPU[0] (elapsed 120min, ~360min left); train_lewm_noreg -> GPU[4] (elapsed 116min, ~124min left)

experiment_monitor.check_cmd: test -f /home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/workspaces/lewm-generalization/current/exp/results/train_lewm_vicreg_DONE && echo "train_lewm_vicreg:DONE" || echo "train_lewm_vicreg:PENDING" && test -f /home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/workspaces/lewm-generalization/current/exp/results/train_dino_wm_DONE && echo "train_dino_wm:DONE" || echo "train_dino_wm:PENDING" && test -f /home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/workspaces/lewm-generalization/current/exp/results/train_oracle_baseline_DONE && echo "train_oracle_baseline:DONE" || echo "train_oracle_baseline:PENDING" && test -f /home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/workspaces/lewm-generalization/current/exp/results/train_lewm_noreg_DONE && echo "train_lewm_noreg:DONE" || echo "train_lewm_noreg:PENDING"
experiment_monitor.pid_check_cmd: pid=$(cat /home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/workspaces/lewm-generalization/current/exp/results/train_lewm_vicreg.pid 2>/dev/null) && (ps -p $pid > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo "train_lewm_vicreg:ALIVE:$pid" || echo "train_lewm_vicreg:DEAD:$pid") || echo "train_lewm_vicreg:NO_PID" && pid=$(cat /home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/workspaces/lewm-generalization/current/exp/results/train_dino_wm.pid 2>/dev/null) && (ps -p $pid > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo "train_dino_wm:ALIVE:$pid" || echo "train_dino_wm:DEAD:$pid") || echo "train_dino_wm:NO_PID" && pid=$(cat /home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/workspaces/lewm-generalization/current/exp/results/train_oracle_baseline.pid 2>/dev/null) && (ps -p $pid > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo "train_oracle_baseline:ALIVE:$pid" || echo "train_oracle_baseline:DEAD:$pid") || echo "train_oracle_baseline:NO_PID" && pid=$(cat /home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/workspaces/lewm-generalization/current/exp/results/train_lewm_noreg.pid 2>/dev/null) && (ps -p $pid > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo "train_lewm_noreg:ALIVE:$pid" || echo "train_lewm_noreg:DEAD:$pid") || echo "train_lewm_noreg:NO_PID"
experiment_monitor.progress_check_cmd: cat /home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/workspaces/lewm-generalization/current/exp/results/train_lewm_vicreg_PROGRESS.json 2>/dev/null || echo "null" && cat /home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/workspaces/lewm-generalization/current/exp/results/train_dino_wm_PROGRESS.json 2>/dev/null || echo "null" && cat /home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/workspaces/lewm-generalization/current/exp/results/train_oracle_baseline_PROGRESS.json 2>/dev/null || echo "null" && cat /home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/workspaces/lewm-generalization/current/exp/results/train_lewm_noreg_PROGRESS.json 2>/dev/null || echo "null"

resume_action.execution_script:
## EXECUTION: experiment_wait
Monitoring 4 task(s), est. ~360min remaining
Poll interval: 600s, Wake check: 90s

WHILE true:
  1. Sleep 90s segments, check wake_cmd each segment
  2. SSH check_cmd → parse task_id:DONE/PENDING
  3. cli_experiment_status → display status panel
  4. All DONE → sync state (cli_recover_experiments + cli_apply_recovery) → break
  5. IF any task just completed AND pending tasks remain in task_plan.json:
     → call cli_dispatch_tasks to get new assignments
     → for each returned skill, launch a new experimenter Agent
  6. Continue polling

**On completion**: cli_record(workspace, 'experiment_cycle')

pending_hooks.name: lark_sync
pending_hooks.resume_hint: restart the sibyl-lark-sync background agent before continuing the loop
